analyst_note: Detailed bank climate disclosure — absolute and financed-emissions targets on explicit 2018/2019 baselines, SBTi-/IPCC-benchmarked to 1.5C, ISAE 3000 limited assurance. One MED (limited assurance level).

specificity.quote: a real-economy transition to net zero
specificity.reasoning: Net-zero ambition framed for the bank's own operations and its lending book.

metric.quote: Absolute emissions from a 2018/2019 baseline include scope 1, 2 and 3
metric.reasoning: Quantified absolute and financed-emissions targets across scopes.

baseline.quote: Baseline year determined by ambition (2018 for Bank, 2019 for Scottish Widows)
baseline.reasoning: Explicit baseline years, documented per business.

target.quote: pathway as defined by SBTi and IPCC ... benchmarking against SBTi criteria
target.reasoning: Sectoral targets benchmarked to SBTi and IPCC 1.5C pathways — binding sectoral commitments.

scope.quote: key performance indicators (KPIs) relating to scopes 1-3
scope.reasoning: Scopes 1, 2 and Scope 3 financed emissions covered.

verification.quote: independent limited assurance over certain ... Assurance Engagements 3000 (Revised)
verification.reasoning: Externally assured to ISAE 3000, but a limited assurance level.

consistency.quote: transition plan sets out how we are positioning
consistency.reasoning: Documented transition plan and a Client Transition Plan process; no contradiction surfaced.
